## What this PR does

<!-- One sentence. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 📚 Adds a paper to a roadmap
- [ ] ✏️ Corrects an existing paper entry (author, date, link, summary…)
- [ ] 🔁 Improves an existing TL;DR / takeaway / prerequisites
- [ ] 🐛 Fixes a website bug
- [ ] 💄 Visual / UX improvement
- [ ] 📖 Documentation only
- [ ] 🌱 New roadmap (please link to the prior Discussions thread)

## Checklist

For paper additions / corrections:

- [ ] Paper meets the four-point quality bar in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Link points to a free, primary source (arXiv preferred)
- [ ] TL;DR, why, prerequisites, and takeaway all filled in
- [ ] Paper is placed at a sensible level
- [ ] If MVRP candidate: explained in the description below why it earns a spot on the critical path
- [ ] Numbering inside the roadmap is sequential (no gaps)

For code changes:

- [ ] Tested in latest Chrome / Firefox / Safari
- [ ] Tested at desktop AND mobile widths
- [ ] No new external dependencies / CDN calls
- [ ] No console errors / warnings
- [ ] No `console.log` debug statements left behind

## Additional context / why this paper

<!-- For paper additions: explain how this fits a real gap in the sequence rather than duplicating coverage. -->
<!-- For corrections: cite the source for the correct information. -->
